product_description: DreamBox Math is an adaptive online math program for K-8 students that provides personalized instruction. It has recently undergone accessibility enhancements to align with Web Content Accessibility Guidelines, including improved compatibility with assistive technology, enhanced screen reader support, intuitive keyboard navigation, and features for low vision and color blindness.

vendor_resources.text: New Enhancements to DreamBox Math by Discovery Education Improves Accessibility for Elementary Students
vendor_resources.justification: Official press release from Discovery Education announcing accessibility enhancements to DreamBox Math, detailing specific features like screen reader support and keyboard navigation, and stating goal to surpass WCAG compliance.

acr_reports.title: Discovery Education Accessibility Conformance Report WCAG Edition
